title: Figure-Warden
description: Changes the model, texture and sound of Warden into Figure from Roblox game "Doors"
body:
# **REQUIRES EMF AND ETF**

This resource pack changes the texture and model of Warden to Figure from Roblox game "Doors". It also changes the some sound Warden makes to the sound Figure makes.
It doesn't change the Warden's animation.
 

This resource pack **MIGHT** crash if you load it when you are in a world or server, so please load it in menu.
 

 Video:
 <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RbjlT6gu0f0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
